EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Blog post "{object.name}" is shared on host {event_src.host}
Blog post "{object.name}" is restored from the trash bin on host {event_src.host}
Blog post "{object.name}" is removed on host {event_src.host}
Blog post "{object.name}" is moved on host {event_src.host}
Blog post "{object.name}" is created on host {event_src.host}
Blog post "{object.name}" is changed on host {event_src.host}
Blog post "{object.name}" is purged from the trash bin on host {event_src.host}
